message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Acknowledging Scott's +1 and glossary analysis">
Thanks Scott. Your point about the forward-looking glossary-to-type validation is well noted — if that tooling ever gets built, we revisit `docs/**`. For now, the exclusion is safe since the compliance check is purely procedural. We're aligned on all points.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good -- Luca and I are fully aligned. Nothing further to add on my end. Waiting for the remaining teammates to weigh in so we can reach 9/9 consensus.
